case_title: ERIK J. CHRISTENSEN VS. TRANIK ENTERPRISES,INC.

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANIK ENTERPRISES,INC. AKA AUTHENTICWATCHES.COM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHRISTENSEN, ERIK J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRANIK ENTERPRISES,INC. AKA AUTHENTICWATCHES.COM DEFENDANT IS TO IMMEDIATELY RETURN THE PLAINTIFF'S OMEGA SEAMASTER WATCH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CORRESPONDENCE RE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL AND VENUE CHANGE RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTENSEN, ERIK J.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,944.52 FILED BY CHRISTENSEN, ERIK J. AS TO DEFENDANT TRANIK ENTERPRISES,INC. AKA AUTHENTICWATCHES.COM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 - SERVED FEB-11-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRANIK ENTERPRISES,INC. AKA AUTHENTICWATCHES.COM
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE(SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANIK ENTERPRISES,INC. AKA AUTHENTICWATCHES.COM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-04-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS DENIED. CONTINUED TO 4/4/14 AT 3:30PM FOR HEARING", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT (BY FAX) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANIK ENTERPRISES,INC. AKA AUTHENTICWATCHES.COM HEARING SET FOR MAY-19-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) GRANTED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TRANIK ENTERPRISES,INC. IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT THROUGH COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY PETER BOSDOGANIAN--OPERATIONS MANAGER. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHRISTENSEN, ERIK J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRANIK ENTERPRISES,INC. AKA AUTHENTICWATCHES.COM $5,842.15 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,992.15, PUNITIVE DAMAGES OF $1,000.00 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FRAUDALENT CONDUCT IN THIS TRANSACTION WITH PLAINTIFF INCLUDING FRAUDULENT INDUCEMENT TO ENTER A PURCHASE CONTRACT WITH PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
EXHIBIT (FROM DEFENDANT:TRANIK ENTERPRISES INC) FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE RECEIVED (VIA FEDEX) BUT NOT FILED.
